payload.arguments: {"cmd":"python3 -c \"import json,collections,pathlib; mods=json.loads(pathlib.Path('mods.json').read_text()); print('mods',len(mods)); print('ids_unique',len({m.get('id') for m in mods})); print('missing_download_url',sum(not m.get('download_url') for m in mods)); print('missing_category',sum(not m.get('category') for m in mods)); print('missing_description',sum(not m.get('description') for m in mods)); print('top', [(m['id'],m['name'],m['downloads'],m['category']) for m in mods[:5]]); print('categories', dict(collections.Counter(m.get('category','') for m in mods).most_common()))\"","workdir":"/Users/steven/CoX-mod-Adventure","yield_time_ms":1000,"max_output_tokens":8000}
payload.name: exec_command
